authority.source_authority: Law Firm Digital Twin retains source and activation authority; Lowell retains legal, data, privacy, release, connector, and human-gate authority.

non_overlap_statement: Only codex-bounded-writer may edit the task scope; specialists and independent-mesh-checker are read-only and cannot approve or mutate writer outputs.

roles.why_needed: One writer integrates the accepted provider-neutral operational mesh.
roles.mission: Implement contracts, registry, deterministic router, documentation, and tests.
roles.authority: May write only operational-mesh files; cannot activate agents or external effects.
acceptance_conditions: No private data or external authority is added

roles.why_needed: Intake, conflicts, assistants, paralegals, docketing, depositions, experts, and filings require distinct operational controls.
roles.mission: Provide read-only legal-operations topology, authority boundaries, and test obligations.
roles.authority: Read-only candidate advice; no legal conclusion or repository write.
acceptance_conditions: Role separations and human-lawyer gates are explicit
stop_conditions: Private or client material is encountered

roles.why_needed: Time, WIP, billing, carrier guidelines, revenue, AR, cash, and reconciliation need finance segregation and IP gates.
roles.mission: Provide read-only finance/carrier roles, source-admission boundaries, and test obligations.
roles.authority: Read-only candidate advice; no accounting conclusion, money movement, or repository write.
acceptance_conditions: Finance segregation, carrier IP controls, and trust boundary are explicit
stop_conditions: Private guideline or client material is encountered

roles.why_needed: DMS, KM, iManage, eDiscovery, custody, holds, production, and legal tech require separate interfaces and controls.
roles.mission: Provide read-only information/eDiscovery topology, adapter boundaries, and test obligations.
roles.authority: Read-only candidate advice; no connector access, privilege decision, disposition, production, or repository write.
acceptance_conditions: Provider-neutral DMS core, custody, privilege, hold, and production gates are explicit
stop_conditions: Private or live-system material is encountered

roles.why_needed: A material reusable agent mesh cannot approve its own decomposition or implementation.
roles.mission: Re-derive acceptance and independently review routing, separation, provider neutrality, authority, privacy, and regression evidence.
roles.authority: Read-only review; cannot edit or promote the implementation.
acceptance_conditions: Independent findings and release recommendation are explicit

proof_obligations.description: Stable roles and routing do not depend on provider or model identity.
External, legal, financial, privilege, filing, settlement, and disposition effects fail closed.
Operational and finance producers have distinct checkers and incompatible duties are separated.
No private/client content or unauthorized reused carrier material enters the public build.
